name: C-7 --validate accepts a well-formed CycloneDX 1.6 bom file per the schema contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.0.0 --emit a.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --validate a.json 2>err.txt && grep -q 'valid CycloneDX 1.6' err.txt && echo validated 1>&2
